query: SELECT id, name, email, company, phone, industry, leadSource, callTrack, callDurationSeconds, conversationId, conversationSummary, painPoints, wants, currentSolutions, leadBrief, diagnosticSnapshot, whatTheyToldUs, fullDiagnostic, solutionAreas, salesCallNextSteps, status, emailStatus, createdAt FROM leads WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%jjinco%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%jinco%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%jjinco%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%jinco%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
